mapper.sql: id, employee_id, date, hours, status, reason, overtime_type, rejection_reason, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM overtime_applications WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId} ORDER BY date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE overtime_applications SET employee_id = #{employeeId}, date = #{date}, hours = #{hours}, status = #{status}, reason = #{reason}, overtime_type = #{overtimeType}, rejection_reason = #{rejectionReason}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
